arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool and Tottenham zero in on Sudakov
arts.sum: Both Liverpool and Tottenham have their sights on midfielder Georgiy Sudakov. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Everton vs Liverpool: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Everton host Liverpool in the Premier League in Saturday's Merseyside derby. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: 'I had to quit Everton - now Arne Slot wants Liverpool to sign me before Man City do'
arts.sum: Antonee Robinson has become one of the Premier League's most highly-rated full-backs since parting ways with Everton in 2019, and Arne Slot is said to be eyeing a bid for the USA international

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'in constant talks' to sign £9.4m Xabi Alonso favourite as three-club transfer battle emerges
arts.sum: Liverpool are in constant dialogue over a deal to sign Bayer Leverkusen wing-back Jeremie Frimpong, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Diogo Jota injury latest: Liverpool forward takes big step towards return after Arne Slot update
arts.sum: The forward has missed Liverpool’s last 10 games

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool make €40m offer for Barca star with 35 goals & 48 assists; Arne Slot pushing for move
arts.sum: Liverpool’s stellar campaign under new manager Arne Slot has propelled the Reds to the top of the Premier League standings with 35 points, maintaining a comfortable seven-point cushion over second-placed Chelsea. Slot’s impact has been equally evident in Europe, where the Merseyside club has dominated the Champions League, securing victory in all five of their […] The post Report: Liverpool make €40m offer for Barca star with 35 goals & 48 assists; Arne Slot pushing for move appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Everton boss Sean Dyche admits a win over Liverpool will ease 'heat' on his job ahead of final top flight Merseyside derby at Goodison Park
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: Dyche ended a 14-year drought for a win at Goodison Park in the fixture last season, a match that all but confirmed their survival while putting a nail in Liverpool's title hopes.

arts.ttl: MARTIN KEOWN TALKS TACTICS: How Everton can halt Mohamed Salah's scoring streak - it won't be easy but Blues can win the last Goodison derby
arts.sum: MARTIN KEOWN: Football is never far away from any conversation in the city and this clash is more poignant than most in the fixture's history, as it will mark the beginning of the end of Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot turns to former Everton star for help in how to beat the Toffees - as Liverpool boss admits it will be 'special' to be involved in the last ever Merseyside derby at Goodison Park
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: Slot knows his team will have to get over a bombardment and weather Storm Darragh - or as some may say, Storm Dyche.

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche issues Everton stars with stern warning ahead of last derby at Goodison Park
arts.sum: Everton manager Sean Dyche knows his players will be up for the final Merseyside derby at Goodison Park but doesn't want emotion to overflow against Liverpool
